message:
fix(acp,tui): remove unused ACP initialize parameter and harden thinking-level lock acquisition

ACP initialize cleanup:
- Remove unused _options: &AcpOptions parameter from handle_initialize(),
  simplifying the call site
- Update handle_initialize_returns_correct_shape test to call the real
  function instead of constructing a mock JSON value, now asserting the
  actual CARGO_PKG_VERSION and the correct toolApproval=false capability

Thinking level cycling lock hardening:
- Acquire agent and session mutex locks upfront at the start of
  cycle_thinking_level() instead of using multiple scattered try_lock()
  calls with separate error-return paths
- Drop both guards explicitly before spawning the save-session task,
  preventing potential deadlock with the save path
- New test: cycle_thinking_level_action_does_not_persist_without_agent_lock
  verifies that when the agent lock is held externally, no session state
  mutation occurs and the user gets an "Agent busy" status message

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
